_meta.description: Merchant catalogs for Canon Engine RPG

merchants.name: Bram the Steady

personality.speech_style: Warm and slightly verbose. Calls customers 'friend'.

inventory.name: Health Potion
inventory.description: A small vial of red liquid.

inventory.name: Iron Rations (3 days)
inventory.description: Dried meat, hardtack, and preserved vegetables.

dialogue_hooks: Business is slow with all these monsters about...
I heard the crypt lord has been restless lately. Bad for trade.
Looking for something specific? I keep a modest stock.

merchants.name: Whisper

personality.speech_style: Speaks in hushed tones. Uses coded language. Never says anything directly incriminating.

inventory.name: Vial of Nightshade Poison
inventory.effect: Apply to weapon: +1d6 poison damage for 3 hits

inventory.name: Lockpick Set
inventory.description: A set of fine steel picks.

inventory.name: Smoke Bomb
inventory.effect: Creates darkness in 20ft radius, allows escape or repositioning
inventory.description: A small ceramic sphere filled with black powder.

inventory.name: Forged Documents
inventory.effect: Can be used to bypass certain checks or gain access
inventory.description: Expertly forged papers. For... legal purposes.

inventory.name: Blackened Dagger
inventory.special: Bonus to stealth attacks: +1d6 if attacking from hiding
inventory.description: A dagger coated in matte black finish. Silent and deadly.

dialogue_hooks: I don't know you. Who sent you?
I have things that... don't appear in any shop window.
Make it quick. The Watch patrols this quarter.

merchants.name: Sera the Wanderer

personality.speech_style: Speaks with an accent. Uses flowery language. Tells stories about distant lands.

inventory.name: Mana Crystal
inventory.description: A faintly glowing blue crystal from the eastern mines.

inventory.name: Exotic Spices
inventory.effect: Can be sold at profit in different regions
inventory.description: Rare spices from across the sea.

inventory.name: Enchanted Thread
inventory.description: Thread imbued with minor arcane energy. Used in advanced crafting.

inventory.name: Amulet of Flame Warding
inventory.description: A turquoise amulet that feels cool to the touch.

inventory.name: Mystery Potion
inventory.effect: Random positive or negative effect (roll d6)
inventory.description: Sera claims she 'forgets what this one does.'

dialogue_hooks: Ah, a traveler! You look like someone who appreciates the unusual.
I have wares from lands you've never heard of, friend.
The road is long, but the company makes it shorter, yes?
